title: GitHub User Search
subtitle: Promises, async/await, fetch, useEffect, and API-driven UI states
mission: Understand side effects by building API-based UI.
prerequisites: day03 — reusable components and controlled inputs
day02 — useState for form and UI state
day01 — component composition and TypeScript props
expectedOutcome: Fetch data from a public API with async/await and fetch
Type API responses with TypeScript interfaces
Run side effects with useEffect and correct dependency arrays
Handle loading, error, empty, and success UI states
Explain why useEffect exists and when not to fetch in render
Debug infinite render loops and missing cleanup patterns
definitionOfDone: GitHub user search fetches profile by username
Loading spinner or message shows during fetch
Error message shows for failed or missing users
Empty state prompts user before first search

tomorrowPreview.title: Dashboard Layout with React Router
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will add React Router with nested layouts — sidebar, navbar, dashboard, profile, settings, and a 404 page — turning your app into a multi-page SPA.
